overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world game (Mafia III) depicting a character walking through a 1960s New Orleans-inspired city. The character navigates historic streets with classical architecture, crosses roads with vintage vehicles, and walks through a sunny plaza containing a Creole food truck and market stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic downtown sidewalk with classical government building

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and crosses the street
turns right to follow sidewalk along the street

agents.ego_description: walking from corner across crosswalk then along sidewalk beside historic buildings

entered.detail: large stone building with tall columns and steps
multi-story brick buildings lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a street corner with a prominent classical stone building. The character crosses the street via crosswalk and proceeds along the sidewalk past parked vintage cars, with historic brick buildings lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with corner bar and vintage traffic

events.description: character crosses street at crosswalk while vintage cars pass by
approaching open plaza area with visible trees and food truck in distance

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk past parked cars and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vintage blue sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: two-story brick corner building with BAR signage
row of vintage parking meters along the curb
food trailer with red Creole Cajun Cookin signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses another street and walks along a commercial sidewalk featuring a corner bar building. Vintage cars drive past on the road, and a food truck becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches a plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with food truck and gathering pedestrians

events.description: character crosses street to enter plaza area
character slows and turns slightly to pass food truck on the right

agents.ego_description: crossing into the plaza and walking past the Creole food truck while navigating through pedestrians

notable_agents.action: cook working inside the food truck window

entered.detail: mature trees providing shade in the plaza
wooden market stalls with red canopies

segments.scene_description: The character enters a sunlit plaza with paved walkways and trees, approaching a food truck serving Creole cuisine. Pedestrians gather near the truck and market stalls as the character navigates through the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market plaza with benches and information boards

events.description: character walks past the food truck and continues deeper into the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past market stalls and benches, navigating around pedestrians

entered.detail: park benches along the plaza walkway

segments.scene_description: Having passed the food truck, the character continues through the open plaza past wooden benches and market stalls with red canopies. The area features scattered pedestrians and information boards, with the urban environment opening up into a pedestrian-friendly zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense urban street corner into a wide, sunlit pedestrian plaza. It begins by following the character across a crosswalk past a classical stone building and a row of historic brick facades lined with parked vintage cars. As the character crosses another street, the scene shifts toward a commercial district featuring a corner bar and passing traffic, with a food truck appearing in the distance. The camera then glides into an open, paved plaza where the environment brightens, moving past trees and gathering pedestrians toward a Creole food truck. Finally, the view expands further through the pedestrian zone, passing wooden benches and market stalls with red canopies under a clear, sunny sky.
